headline: Victor Munoz — update
body: Liverpool set to sign winger Victor Munoz from Osasuna for €40m after triggering release clause. The 22-year-old will pen a six-year contract and become the club's first signing since the appointment of Andoni Iraola as head coach earlier t
text:
Liverpool set to sign winger Victor Munoz from Osasuna for €40m after triggering release clause.
The 22-year-old will pen a six-year contract and become the club's first signing since the appointment of Andoni Iraola as head coach earlier this month.
https://t.co/uDtpOVcCDC
